ceremony.name: Provost Host Toast & Boast
ceremony.purpose: ceremonial presentation of evidence-backed Chess Court moves with humor, rigor, and counter-review

required_before_public_artifact: secret scan PASS or reviewed WARN for Zora image use

canon_line: The toast may celebrate. The boast may sparkle. The proof still lives in receipts. Oxford is an archetype here, not an affiliation.
